/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vino_local_node.dir/src/node/LocalNodeApi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_local_node.dir/src/node/LocalNodeConsoleAssets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_local_node.dir/src/node/LocalNodeForwarder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_local_node.dir/src/node/LocalNodeStorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_local_node.dir/src/node_main.cpp.o -o vino_local_node  libvino_desktop_core.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
